use_cases: Display podcast episode information with embedded audio playback controls
Show podcast artwork, title, duration, and play/pause functionality
Present podcast series episodes in a browsable card format
Enable quick audio preview within content feeds or landing pages
ai_summary: A media card component designed for displaying podcast episodes with integrated audio player controls. Features a clean, minimalist interface typical of shadcn/ui patterns, supporting podcast artwork, title metadata, and playback buttons. Built as a composite component suitable for content platforms, creator tools, and educational applications requiring podcast embedding capabilities.
